title: Vietnamese Chicken Spring Rolls
description: A delicious and healthy Vietnamese dish made with chicken, vegetables, and rice noodles, served with a sweet and spicy sauce.
instructions: Prepare the filling by mixing cooked chicken, shredded lettuce, sliced cucumber, grated carrots, and bean sprouts.
Soak rice noodles in hot water for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Assemble the spring rolls by placing a tablespoon of the filling in the center of a spring roll skin.
Brush the edges of the spring roll skin with a little water.
Roll the spring roll tightly, starting from one corner.
Serve the spring rolls with a sweet and spicy sauce made by mixing peanut butter, soy sauce, and hoisin sauce.
Garnish with chopped peanuts or sesame seeds, if desired.
